ocr_findings.description: IPv4 binary breakdown table (10進数表記 vs 2進数表記 with 8-bit groupings and '全部で32ビット' brace) is flattened into a plain vertical list of numbers; two-column structure and the spanning brace label are lost
Page number '475' appears on line 3 of OCR output, mid-document before the main heading, instead of at the bottom margin — minor reading-order artifact

reviewer_notes: Page covers URL and IPv6 learning content. Body prose is accurately captured. The IPv4 binary table loses its visual two-column layout and the '全部で32ビット' grouping brace annotation, which slightly reduces comprehension of the encoding explanation. The furigana 'ユーアールエル' and 'アイピービイフォー' are present in OCR. The exam callout 'コレ' is correctly rendered here.
